title: Storage drive: btrfs module for 4TB replacement SSD + re-enable backups + 3mf sync
description: Dead WD 4TB storage drive replaced with Fanxiang S101 4TB SATA SSD (blank at /dev/sda). Single btrfs label=storage, @storage (snapshotted, btrbk daily) + @media (unsnapshotted) + @snapshots subvols via new nixos/modules/storage-drive.nix patterned on code-drive.nix. Re-enable download-droplet-backups + backup-local-state timers in hosts/minerva/default.nix. New bin/sync-3mf script + daily timer rsyncing ~ *.3mf to /mnt/storage/3d/3mf-sync. Plan: ~/.claude/plans/next-i-replaced-compiled-scone.md

title: Port local.ai.yml (Claude skills/agents/settings + MCP servers) to a nix home-manager module
description: The AI tool wiring (Claude skills/agents/settings.json/CLAUDE.md, MCP npm servers + registration, opencode/codex) is still ansible-only. Port to home-manager so it is nix-managed after the tomford->tom migration.
notes: Partial: nixos/home/ai-tools.nix ports Claude skills/agents/settings + codex AGENTS.md symlinks + MCP npm (declarative package.json + activation install). DEFERRED: parent CLAUDE.md/per-project wiring, opencode.jsonc render, claude/codex mcp add registration.
close_reason: Ported to nixos/home/ai-tools.nix (present, 3301B): Claude skills/agents/settings + MCP npm via home-manager activation.

title: Provision replacement 4TB storage drive + restore backup pipeline
description: Old WD 4TB (WD40EZRX) died 2026-07-14 (SATA bus drop under write load, SMART INQUIRY fails). When replacement arrives: partition btrfs, label 'storage', uncomment /mnt/storage mount + download-droplet-backups + backup-local-state units in nixos/hosts/minerva/default.nix, rebuild. Then: second copy of @home-stage, re-download droplet backups from prod, attempt salvage of old drive (mysql dumps + andromeda tar from 2026-07-14 may be readable read-only). Consider offsite copy story.

title: minerva: verify OLLAMA_CONTEXT_LENGTH=16384 after NixOS switch
description:
nixos/modules/ai.nix now sets services.ollama.environmentVariables.OLLAMA_CONTEXT_LENGTH = "16384" (default 4096 silently truncates prompts — garbage bevvi taxonomy drafts). After switch verify:

  tr '\0' '\n' < /proc/$(pgrep -f 'ollama serve')/environ | grep OLLAMA_CONTEXT_LENGTH

bevvi harness guard assumes match: HARNESS_CONTEXT_TOKENS=16384 in apps/bevvi/bin/harness-gen-taxonomies.ts. Replaces old Pop!_OS user-unit edit (~/.config/systemd/user/ollama.service).

title: minerva NixOS switchover: premigration backup + ollama path + install docs

title: Package official Bambu Studio AppImage via appimageTools on minerva
description: nixpkgs bambu-studio 02.08 renders blank 3D bed; orca-slicer network plugin heap-crashes. Package the official Bambu Studio AppImage as a proper nix derivation (appimageTools.wrapType2) with webkitgtk_4_1 + locale support so the 'Switching language failed' modal we hit under ad-hoc appimage-run is resolved. Goal: working bed render + LAN network send.
notes: LOCALE FIX (round 2): 'Switching to en_GB failed' — Bambu's wxWidgets maps its 'en' lang setting to en_GB regardless of system locale (user is en_US). Root cause: glibc>=2.27 reads LOCALE_ARCHIVE_2_27 BEFORE LOCALE_ARCHIVE, and buildFHSEnv sets LOCALE_ARCHIVE_2_27 to a minimal 3MB en_US-only archive. Fix: runScript now exports BOTH LOCALE_ARCHIVE and LOCALE_ARCHIVE_2_27 = full glibcLocales (233MB, has en_GB + all Bambu UI languages). Verified: no language error in log, LOCALE_ARCHIVE_2_27 confirmed in running proc env.

title: Finish /home/tomford -> /home/tom migration cleanup (settings.json content + systemd/gtk links)
description:
Home was renamed /home/tomford -> /home/tom, leaving dangling absolute symlinks. Layer A (18 content-only ~/.claude links: CLAUDE.md, cavecrew agents, caveman + team skills) was relinked on 2026-07-14. REMAINING:

Layer B — ~/.claude/settings.json is still a dangling symlink AND the checked-in ops/claude.tomfordweb/settings.json hardcodes /home/tomford in 5 hook/node paths (incl. an fnm node path that likely doesn't exist on this NixOS box). Also /home/tomford hardcodes in ops: .mcp.json (3), CLAUDE.global.md (2), vars/local-variables.yml (2 - playwright_chrome_path, sidemux). Fix content first (ops PR), THEN relink ~/.claude/settings.json - otherwise broken hooks fire every prompt.

Layer C — dangling systemd user .wants links (whisper-ptt, ollama, dbeaver-droplet-tunnel), ~/.config/gtk-{3,4}.0/gtk.css, ~/.config/discord/Discord all -> /home/tomford. Relinking systemd re-enables/starts services (runtime side effects) - confirm intent.

Note: generators mostly use $HOME correctly, so re-running nixos-rebuild switch and ansible local.ai.yml --tags claude regenerates managed links - but NOT the layer-B content hardcodes. This issue is really ops-repo scoped.
notes: Done: ~/.claude.json (41 paths), ~/.claude/settings.json + ~/.codex/AGENTS.md re-pointed, dead .local/bin + systemd + gtk-era links cleared. Repo sweep clean (remaining refs are intentional migration docs + regenerable ibus/glab cache).

title: Retire stale XDG_CONFIG_HOME=repo override (breaks Slack sign-in)
description: ~/.config/environment.d/10-xdg.conf (orphan, not nix-managed) still exports XDG_CONFIG_HOME=repo/config, the pre-migration trick dotfiles.nix was meant to retire. Electron apps (Slack) put their profile in dotfiles/config/Slack; the browser magic-login deep-link relaunch disagrees on the path so sign-in never completes. Also leaked config/Slack (88 files incl auth Cookies) into the git index (staged, not committed). Fix: delete orphan env file, patch hyprland.conf:25 and tmux.conf:113 off $XDG_CONFIG_HOME, unstage+gitignore config/Slack, remove repo Slack profile.
notes: Repo changes committed on branch fix/xdg-config-home-retire (pushed): minerva monitors, hyprland.conf + tmux.conf off $XDG_CONFIG_HOME, gitignore config/Slack. Host actions done: orphan ~/.config/environment.d/10-xdg.conf deleted (backup in scratchpad), config/Slack unstaged+removed, temp ~/.local/share/applications/slack.desktop override pins --user-data-dir=~/.config/Slack. REMAINING: user verify Slack sign-in; re-login to activate env removal; gh re-auth + open/merge PR; delete temp override after relogin.
close_reason: XDG_CONFIG_HOME=repo override retired (commit c6e1224); ~/.config now real via mkOutOfStoreSymlink. Minor: a stale present-tense comment lingers at config/git/config:1.
